text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as the autumn Tenno Sho is
approaching, I'm getting ready to go home after
work when...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hi, Trainer! What's the haps?
choice_data_list: Just finishing up. What brings you here so late?
Just finishing up. What brings you here so late?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hi, Trainer! What's the haps?
choice_data_list: Just finishing up. What brings you here so late?
Just finishing up. What brings you here so late?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You can't tell from my outfit? I'm going to do
some training!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Senior-year racers are as fast as they come, and
some super-talented newer students will be
entering too...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: So I'm mega-ultra eager to get to work. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Teehee, you know me so well. I'm itching to get
out there and run with the little ones!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But I really am pushing myself hard. I'm doing
everything I can to ensure this is a fun race!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
So I was thinking... If it's okay, I was hoping you'd
join me.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! Let's work up a sweat and get that
gleaming glow of youth!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
This is a good time for training. It's not as hot at
night.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...Hm? It looks like there's someone else here.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Woo-hoo! I improved my time again!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Okay, one more lap! I need to focus on my pace
this time.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I've gotta get... amped to the max!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Spe is training all alone at this hour...
choice_data_list: She looks like she's enjoying her practice.
She looks like she's enjoying her practice.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I can feel how eager she is to run.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, why don't we train somewhere else? I don't
want to interrupt her.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure we'll run together one day, so keep at it,
Spe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, a press conference is held for
the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A list of runners has already been handed out
before the conference. However...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Why won't you show me the list?!
choice_data_list: I thought it would be more fun this way.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hmph... What a meanie...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Well, I guess I'll find out soon enough when the
press conference starts!

text_block_list.name: MC A
text_block_list.text:
The press conference with the participants of the
autumn Tenno Sho will now begin.

text_block_list.name: MC A
text_block_list.text: If the first runner could take the stage, please.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
O-okay! I'm so nervous being the first one to
speak...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Wha?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Um, my name is Special Week! I'm so happy to be
here!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
We hear that you've been training particularly
hard in preparation for the race.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yes, but I've been so excited that it didn't really
feel like hard work!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to all of it, I'm in good shape. Actually,
I'm feeling the best I've ever felt!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
You mentioned being excited. Is there anything
special that has you so eager?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I'm excited because I think it's going to be
the most fun race ever!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I watched Grass—I mean, Grass Wonder—in the
Yasuda Kinen, and it was so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It was so exciting to see her run with everything
she had!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But as much as I enjoyed watching it, I was also
really jealous... It looked more fun to be a runner
than a spectator!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text: You felt that you wanted to join a race like that?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I thought I wasn't good enough, and that I
wouldn't be able to make the race fun...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But I continued to push myself, because there's
someone I really admire—someone I want to
catch up to!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
She taught me the joy of running, and in the
autumn Tenno Sho, I'll finally be able to pass her
on the track.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I will... I will win against Maruzensky!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ohhh!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I guess this is why you didn't show me the list of
participants...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky continues to watch as Special Week
speaks onstage.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, look at her... I'm so excited, I can't stop
grinning.
choice_data_list: I bet it's going to be a fun race!
I bet it's going to be a fun race!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: It sure will... I accept your challenge, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the stage is set for a big showdown with
Special Week at the autumn Tenno Sho!
